title: Memory concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped memory identity, patient and collateral history, progression, domains, daily impact, mood, medicine history, cognition, neurological and functional assessment, general blood tests, previous cognitive assessment, formal cognitive assessment, history, and referral fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports patient and collateral history, cognitive, behavioural and psychological symptoms, daily-life impact, physical and neurological examination, appropriate blood or urine tests, validated cognitive tools, functional informant tools, reversible causes, rapid progression, and specialist assessment.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers

treatment_and_management.text: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports mapped arranged follow-up, social support, and care-plan fields.

source_limitations: Children and memory concerns outside suspected dementia are outside the exact source.

Head trauma, focal symptoms, falls, acute behaviour wording, blood pressure, ECG, specific individual laboratory tests, imaging, generic safety-netting, generic clinician plans, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, cognitive interpretation, driving decisions, referral, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
